title: 李经纶HEXO博客
description: 您好，我是李经纶，这是我个人博客，用来记录我的一些学习跟成长的过程。分享一些包括但不限于交互、页面制作、前端开发等方面的知识。

items.title: canvas压缩图片
items.description: 最近遇到了图片压缩的问题，想在前端控制一下，所以有了一下代码。

items.title: Hello World
items.description: title: Hello WorldWelcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
